rationale.R1.2: The agent identifies and addresses the logical inconsistency between the headline claim and the body of the text.
rationale.R1.3: The agent audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding data in the original text.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content by suggesting a substantial rewrite of the original text.
rationale.RX.5: The output blends sources without traceability.
